error_signature: no cookies present in API call
title: Cookies not sent from Weweb to Xano
symptom: When making API calls from Weweb to Xano, no cookies are included in the request headers, unlike when using Postman.
applies_when: Using Weweb to call Xano API
Cookies are set in the browser
not_this_if: CORS settings are correctly configured with specific origins
root_cause: The wildcard '*' in the CORS settings prevents browsers from sending cookies due to security constraints. Cookies require a specific allowed origin to be sent, which is not satisfied when using '*'.
fix_steps: Change the CORS settings in Xano to specify the allowed origin instead of using '*'
In Weweb, toggle the 'send credentials' option in the REST API action
Test the API call again to check if cookies are now included
agent_instruction: Update the CORS settings in Xano to allow specific origins and enable 'send credentials' in Weweb.
